properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v3 v8 v9 v10 v5 v5 v11

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Here in this worn and weary land Where many a dream has died

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Like a tree planted by the water We never will run dry

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: So living water flowing through God we thirst for more of You Fill our hearts and flood our souls With one desire

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Just to know You and yo make You known We lift Your name on High Shine like the sun made darkness run and hide We know we were made for so much more Than ordinary lives It's time for us to more than just survive We were made to thrive

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Into Your word we're digging deep To know our Father's heart

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Into the world we're reaching out To show them who You are

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Just to know You and to make You known We lift Your name on High Shine like the sun made darkness run and hide We know we were made for so much more Than ordinary lives It's time for us to more than just survive We were made to thrive

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Joy unspeakable, faith unsinkable, Love unstoppable, anything is possible Joy unspeakable, faith unsinkable, Love unstoppable, anything is possible Joy unspeakable, faith unsinkable, Love unstoppable, anything is possible Joy unspeakable, faith unsinkable, Love unstoppable, anything is possible

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: Just to know You and to make You known We lift Your name on High Shine like the sun made darkness run and hide We know we were made for so much more Than ordinary lives It's time for us to more than just survive We were made to thrive Hey!
